title: Map a handler boundary without framework leakage
scenario: A handler adapter should translate request DTOs, call the use case, and return response data without pushing HTTP concepts into domain code.
instructions: In the adapters module, add Response and implement handle_register_user over UserRepository by converting the request, calling register_user, and mapping outcomes to status values.

hints.body: Add Response { status: u16 } beside RegisterUserRequest in the adapters module.
Map RequestError to 400, Ok to 201, DuplicateEmail to 409, and repository errors to 503.
One complete solution for Map a handler boundary without framework leakage is shown below.

completionExplanation: handle_register_user now performs adapter-only work: DTO conversion, use-case invocation, and status mapping, while domain and application code remain framework-free.
